org.apache.paimon.mergetree

Class LookupLevels

  • java.lang.Object
    • org.apache.paimon.mergetree.LookupLevels
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Closeable, AutoCloseable, Levels.DropFileCallback

    public class LookupLevels
extends Object
implements Levels.DropFileCallback, Closeable
    Provide lookup by key.
